hooks.prompt: Check if the current directory has a CLAUDE.md file. If it does NOT have one, and it does have a package.json, pyproject.toml, go.mod, Cargo.toml, or pom.xml (indicating it's a real project), output EXACTLY this message and nothing else: 'Tip: This project has no AI dev setup. Run /scaffold to generate CLAUDE.md, agents, skills, rules, and MCP configs tailored to this codebase.' If CLAUDE.md already exists, output nothing.
